sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113437" key="xa/roy" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χάροψ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οπος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χαροπός,</foreign> <sense id="n113437.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bright-eyed,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γλαῦκος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:114" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.114</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
